stemHtml:
An Aeronautical Information Circular (AIC) shall comply with the following general specifications:

1. The originating aeronautical information service shall select the AICs that are to be given international distribution
2. Each AIC shall be allocated a serial number, which shall be consecutive and based on the calendar year
3. Each AIC shall be allocated a serial letter and number
4. A checklist of AICs currently in force shall be issued at least once a year, with distribution as for the AICs
5. A checklist of AICs currently in force shall be issued at least twice a year, with distribution as for the AICs
